data_center.label: $75.2 billion
data_center.new_reporting_framework: Data Center split into Hyperscale and ACIE (AI Clouds, Industrial and Enterprise) starting Q1 FY27

edge_computing.label: $6.4 billion
edge_computing.note: Includes gaming, automotive, AI-RAN, robotics, and ProViz

blackwell.context: Dynamo 1.0 entered production, boosting inference on Blackwell GPUs by up to 7x
blackwell.blackwell_ultra: Available with Google Cloud A5X instances (Vera Rubin-powered)
blackwell.new_gpu_announced: RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPU

q2_fy27_revenue.label: $91.0 billion
q2_fy27_revenue.note: No Data Center compute revenue from China assumed in outlook

highlights: Record revenue of $81.6 billion, up 85% YoY
Record Data Center revenue of $75.2 billion, up 92% YoY
Data Center compute record $60.4B, up 77% YoY
Data Center networking record $14.8B, up 199% YoY
NVIDIA Dynamo 1.0 - open source software boosting Blackwell inference by up to 7x
NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform announced (Vera CPU + BlueField-4 STX)
Share buyback authorization increased by $80 billion
Quarterly dividend increased from $0.01 to $0.25 per share
New reporting framework: Data Center (Hyperscale + ACIE) and Edge Computing
earnings.p_e_ratio_note: GAAP NI $58.3B on $81.6B revenue — GAAP net margin ~71.5%, Non-GAAP net margin ~55.8%
